description: A screenshot of a typed White House press statement headed with the 'THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON' wordmark, dated 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE 01/26/25', titled 'Statement from the Press Secretary'. The body text states that the Government of Colombia agreed to accept all illegal aliens returned from the United States, including on U.S. military aircraft, that drafted tariffs and sanctions will be held in reserve, and that visa sanctions and enhanced Customs and Border Protection inspections remain until the first planeload of deportees is returned.
notable_text: THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON; FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE 01/26/25; Statement from the Press Secretary; illegal aliens; deportation
